issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for configuration and extension development.
Installation instructions omit Windows support, assuming macOS or Linux.
Installation uses curl to pipe a remote script into sh without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Configure Zed for TypeScript+React with Vim mode and inline AI assist on Ctrl+L
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentions vim_mode and JSON but invents action names; treatment uses the exact assistant::InlineAssist binding, TypeScript external prettier formatter, and inline_completions disabled_globs from the skill.

scenarios.name: Scaffold a Zed extension that registers a custom LSP for a new language
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gestures at Rust/WASM but invents API surface; treatment uses zed_extension_api types, register_extension! macro, and the documented extension.toml grammars/language_servers sections.
